# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.OcclusionVolumeStrength property

How strongly walls reduce volume (in addition to AudioEffectLowPassFilter).

`0.0` = no volume reduction at all, only filtering.

`1.0` = full physically-derived dB loss per wall.

Values around `0.3`-`0.5` sound natural for most games.

```csharp
public float OcclusionVolumeStrength { get; set; }
```
